name: Salesforce
one_liner: Enterprise CRM platform with comprehensive API and MCP support
access_details: Free Developer Edition with Agentforce and Data Cloud, doesn't expire
notes: Salesforce offers both DX MCP Server (local) and Hosted MCP Servers. Free Developer Edition includes MCP access.

name: HubSpot
one_liner: All-in-one CRM platform with marketing, sales, and service hubs

notes: HubSpot offers free CRM with API access. OAuth2 authentication for apps.

notes: Pipedrive offers OAuth2 and API key authentication. Free trial available.

notes: Attio offers API key authentication with free tier.
